## Test plan / 测试计划

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] New tests added for behavioral changes (if applicable)

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, PII) in code or tests
- [ ] User-facing strings are bilingual (zh + en) where applicable
- [ ] HTML output uses `_esc()` for user-controlled values
- [ ] Identity update methods respect field whitelists
